# HELP ss_bytes_logical_total Logical bytes written.
# TYPE ss_bytes_logical_total counter
ss_bytes_logical_total 987654321
# HELP ss_bytes_physical_total Physical bytes stored after dedup.
# TYPE ss_bytes_physical_total counter
ss_bytes_physical_total 123456789
# HELP ss_disk_used_bytes Bytes used on the snapshot volume.
# TYPE ss_disk_used_bytes gauge
ss_disk_used_bytes 402653184
# HELP ss_disk_total_bytes Snapshot volume capacity.
# TYPE ss_disk_total_bytes gauge
ss_disk_total_bytes 1073741824
# HELP ss_page_dedup_hits_total Page-level dedup hits.
# TYPE ss_page_dedup_hits_total counter
ss_page_dedup_hits_total{tier="warm",shard="0"} 55210
ss_page_dedup_hits_total{tier="hot",shard="0"} 90021
# HELP ss_page_writes_total Page writes.
# TYPE ss_page_writes_total counter
ss_page_writes_total 145231
